overview: Forge is an AI-powered website and app builder that takes anyone from a plain-language description to a live, production-ready site in minutes. A guided wizard captures site type, business description, visual style, and desired features. Forge then auto-generates the full site — design, layout, content, and functionality — in one shot. Users land in a visual editor with desktop/tablet/mobile preview, make tweaks, run automated pre-launch checks (SEO, performance, forms), and publish to a free subdomain or custom domain.
features: Guided 4-step wizard (site type, business description, visual style, feature selection)
AI-powered site generation with simulated generation loading flow
Visual editor with desktop / tablet / mobile device preview
Inline text editing for generated site sections
Pre-launch checklist (SEO, mobile layout, performance, forms)
